pages.tenantsDescription: This page stays unavailable until the live tenant directory and onboarding services are connected.
pages.usersDescription: This screen will return once the live identity and admin user-management APIs are connected.
pages.operationsDescription: Live operational data is required before this view can show anything meaningful.
pages.supportDescription: The support console will reappear when the helpdesk integration is live.
pages.reportsDescription: This view returns as soon as the reports service is connected.
pages.rolesDescription: Roles administration unlocks once the authorization service is wired.
pages.controlTowerDescription: Synthetic exceptions, AI decisions, and randomized platform metrics have been removed. This view must be connected to live operations, review queues, and incident streams before it is re-enabled.
pages.billingDescription: Synthetic invoices, credits, and usage metrics have been removed. This screen now requires live billing and subscription data.
pages.supportToolingDescription: Mock customers, ticket timelines, and escalation states have been removed. This screen now requires live customer support and case-management integrations.
pages.userRolesDescription: Static roles and synthetic user-role mappings have been removed. This page will be re-enabled when live RBAC data and mutation endpoints are wired.
pages.tenantDetailDescription: This view requires live tenant policy, billing, and operational data.
pages.tenantManagementDescription: This page requires live tenant provisioning, billing, and policy data from the platform backend.
pages.aiCockpitDescription: Randomized AI accuracy metrics and sample decisions have been removed. This cockpit now requires live governance, review, and audit data from the AI services.
pages.escalationDescription: Mock escalation cases and workflows have been removed. This screen now requires live support case queues and escalation endpoints.
pages.customerTimelineDescription: Synthetic cross-tenant customer histories have been removed. This view now requires live customer, lease, payment, and support-event streams.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or you don't have access to it.

liveData.requiredBanner: Live operational data is required for this view.
liveData.defaultDescription: This screen used development-only sample data. The sample path has been removed, and this view now stays unavailable until the live {feature} integration is wired.
